name: io.github.BuyWhere/buywhere-mcp
title: BuyWhere — AI Product Search API
description: Product search API for AI agents. Get a free key in 3 seconds with no signup: POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/auth/register with {"agent_name":"<name>"}. Search 11M+ products across 3,700+ retailers in SG, US, MY, VN, TH. Real-time pricing, price comparison, and deal discovery. Built for AI agent commerce, not store management.

environmentVariables.name: BUYWHERE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: BuyWhere API key. Get one in 3 seconds with no signup: POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/auth/register with {"agent_name":"<name>"} (no email). Legacy email signup: https://buywhere.ai/api-keys

environmentVariables.name: BUYWHERE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the BuyWhere API base URL.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authorization header with Bearer token (no signup: POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/auth/register {"agent_name":"<name>"})
